Ntc Of Hrg On Ptlf'S Req For Default Judgmnt; Summary Of The Case
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Daniel Brome, Esq. for the plaintiff The Board of Trustees in their Capacities as the Laaborers Health and Welfare Trust Fund for Northern California, et al.
Plaintiff's Witness John Hagen was sworn and direct examined.
Default of Defendants Anthony G. Amarillasm, ind. and dba A & T Paving; Arthur C. Amarillas, ind. and dba A & T Paving; Arthur Gardea Amarillas, ind. and dba A & T Paving and A & T Paving has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $46568.27
Prejudgment Interest $16367.67
Attorneys' fees - $11850.50
Costs - $1471.36, for a Total of $76,257.80
Counsel to prepare the Judgment on Form JUD100 format and submit to dept. 514 for signature.

Judgment was submitted on 06-25-12 and signed by the Court.
